recipes.name: CABLE ANGLE 15M
recipes.reason: Cable assembly with 8 components, represents electrical/cabling category

recipes.name: SENSOR ASMBL ANGLE 0-90 (D)
recipes.reason: Sensor assembly with 16 components, complex BOM for angle measurement

recipes.name: CABLE ATB 80M
recipes.reason: Long cable assembly (80M) with 4 components, represents cable length variation

recipes.name: DISPLAY D SERIES DRM 1005
recipes.reason: Complex display assembly (66 components), largest BOM in selection, D Series flagship

recipes.name: PCB ASMB D SERIES CONTLR
recipes.reason: Controller PCB with 26 components, mid-complexity D Series product

recipes.name: DISPLAY E-DASH
recipes.reason: E-Dash display with 52 components, represents newer product line

recipes.name: DISPLAY E-SLI V2
recipes.reason: E-SLI V2 display with 54 components, v2 product iteration validation

recipes.name: CABLE LOAD 110M V2
recipes.reason: Long load cable (110M) with 4 components, largest cable variant

recipes.name: SENSOR ASMBL LOAD 2.25T
recipes.reason: Load sensor assembly (2.25T capacity) with 4 components, sensor variant

recipes.name: PCB ASMB L/C JUNCTION B-DASH
recipes.reason: Simple PCB assembly (3 components), minimal BOM for low-cost testing

recipes.name: LINE RIDER LR-TM
recipes.reason: Line Rider complete assembly (4 components), specialty product with high value

recipes.name: PCB ASMB WIND CONTLR
recipes.reason: Wind controller PCB with 23 components, represents sensor control electronics

metadata.selection_method: Strategic selection across categories: 3 from LOAD (largest BOM category), 2 from D SERIES (second largest), 2 from ANGLE, 1 each from WIND, ATB, E-DASH, E-SLI, LR-TM
metadata.validation_purpose: Cost verification across component types, product categories, and complexity levels

selection_rationale.diversity: Selected across 8 different product categories (61% of all categories)
selection_rationale.complexity: Range from 3-component simple PCBs to 66-component complex displays
selection_rationale.cost_coverage: From budget-friendly sub-500 rupee PCBs to premium 11k+ Line Rider assemblies
selection_rationale.product_type_coverage: Includes cables, sensors, PCBs, displays, junctions, and complete assemblies
selection_rationale.company_representation: Both Dynamic Crane Engineers and Dynamic Servitech represented
